title.ko: 전기 케이블 또는 라인, 또는 광케이블 및 전기 케이블 또는 라인의 조합 설치
title.en: INSTALLATION OF ELECTRIC CABLES OR LINES, OR OF COMBINED OPTICAL AND ELECTRIC CABLES OR LINES

definition.ko: 설치의 주요한 형 내측; 두상; 지하 또는 수중 H02G3/00; 7/00; 9/00 특수한 설치 부스바; 피뢰용 도체; 이동부분 H02G5/00; 13/00; 11/00 케이블 부속품 H02G15/00 설치, 보수, 수리 H02G1/00

title.en: Methods or apparatus specially adapted for installing, maintaining, repairing, or dismantling electric cables or lines
for overhead lines or cables
for mounting or stretching
for laying cables, e.g. laying apparatus on vehicle
through tubing or conduit, e.g. rod or draw wire for pushing or pulling
in or under water
for removing insulation or armouring from cables, e.g. from the end thereof
for joining or terminating cables
for repairing insulation or armouring of cables

title.ko: 건물, 기타 구조물, 차량의 내부 또는 외부에 있어서의 전기케이블 또는 보호튜브의 설치 (버스-바의 설치 H02G5/00; 가공 설치 H02G7/00; 지중 또는 지상의 설치 H02G9/00)
title.en: Installations of electric cables or lines or protective tubing therefor in or on buildings, equivalent structures or vehicles (installations of bus-bars H02G0005000000;overhead installations H02G0007000000;installations in or on the ground H02G0009000000)
Details
Cooling
Protective tubing or conduits, e.g. cable ladders or cable troughs
Joints for connecting lengths of protective tubing to each other or to casings, e.g. to distribution box; Ensuring electrical continuity in the joint
Distribution boxes; Connection or junction boxes
for surface mounting on a wall
for flush mounting
Fastening of cover or lid to box
structurally associated with support for line-connecting terminals within the box
providing line outlets
Ceiling roses
Installations of cables or lines through walls, floors or ceilings, e.g. into buildings
Installations of cables or lines on walls, floors or ceilings
using mounting clamps
using separate protective tubing
Installations of cables or lines in walls, floors or ceilings
the cables or lines being installed in preestablished conduits or ducts
using separate protective tubing in the conduits or ducts
Installations of bus-bars
Open installations
Partially-enclosed installations, e.g. in ducts and adapted for sliding or rolling current collection
Totally-enclosed installations, e.g. in metal casings
Connection boxes therefor
Cooling

title.ko: 전선 또는 전기케이블의 가공 설치 (버스-바의 설치 H02G5/00)
title.en: Overhead installations of electric lines or cables (installations of bus-bars H02G0005000000)
Devices for adjusting or maintaining mechanical tension, e.g. take-up device
Arrangements or devices for relieving mechanical tension
Suspension arrangements or devices for electric cables or lines
Suspensions for lines or cables along a separate supporting wire, e.g. S-hook
Members clamped to the supporting wire or to the line or cable
Flexible members or lashings wrapped around both the supporting wire and the line or cable
Devices for maintaining distance between parallel conductors, e.g. spacer
Arrangements or devices for damping mechanical oscillations of lines, e.g. for reducing production of sound
Devices for removing snow or ice from lines or cables
Devices affording mechanical protection in the event of breakage of a line or cable, e.g. net for catching broken lines
Spatial arrangements or dispositions of lines or cables on poles, posts or towers
Arrangements of earthing wires suspended between mastheads
Installations of electric cables or lines in or on the ground or water
laid directly in or on the ground, river-bed or sea-bottom; Coverings therefor, e.g. tile
in surface ducts; Ducts or covers therefor
in underground tubes or conduits; Tubes or conduits therefor
in tunnels
in cable chambers, e.g. in manhole or in handhole
supported on or from floating structures, e.g. in water
Arrangements of electric cables or lines between relatively-movable parts
using take-up reel or drum
Installations of lightning conductors; Fastening thereof to supporting structure
Cable fittings
Devices for relieving mechanical stress

title.ko: 케이블도입구의 밀봉수단(가스 또는 유류롤 충전된 또는 싸여진 케이블을 위한 도입구 H02G 15/32)
title.en: Sealing means for cable inlets (inlets for cables filled with, or surrounded by, gas or oil H02G0015320000)

title.ko: 케이블단말(가스 또는 기름 넣은 케이블에 대한 것 H02G 15/22)
title.en: Cable terminations (for gas- or oil-filled cables H02G0015220000)
Cable-end sealings

title.ko: 케이블 종단상자, 프레임 또는 기타 구조물
title.en: Cable terminating boxes, frames or other structures

title.ko: 전기적 스트레스를 완화하기 위한 장치를 갖는 것
title.en: with devices for relieving electrical stress
connected to the cable shield only (H02G0015072000 takes precedence)
of the condenser type
for multi-conductor cables

title.ko: 케이블 접속 (가스 또는 오일 충전 케이블을 위한 것 H02G15/24)
title.en: Cable junctions (for gas or oil filled cables H02G0015240000)

title.ko: 상자에 의해서 보호되는 것, 예 배전, 연결 또는 접속 상자에 의한 것
title.en: protected by boxes, e.g. by distribution, connection or junction boxes

title.ko: 전기적 스트레스를 완화하기 위한 장치를 갖는 것
title.en: with devices for relieving electrical stress
connected to the cable shield only (H02G0015107000 takes precedence)
of the condenser type
Boxes split longitudinally in main cable direction
Boxes split perpendicularly to main cable direction
for multiconductor cables
for incorporating transformers, loading coils or amplifiers
specially adapted for submarine cables
structurally associated with support for line-connecting terminals within the box

title.ko: 슬리이브로 보호되는 되는 것, 예. 통신케이블에 대한 것(2개의 부분으로서 되는 커버 H02G 15/10)
title.en: protected by sleeves, e.g. for communication cable (two-part covers H02G0015100000)
with devices for relieving electrical stress
connected to cable shield only
with support means for ends of the sleeves
having lapped insulation

title.ko: 가스 또는 유류로 충전된 또는 싸여진 케이블에 대한 부속품(H02G 15/34가 우선)
title.en: Cable fittings for cables filled with or surrounded by gas or oil (H02G0015340000 takes precedence)
Cable terminations
Cable-end sealings
Cable junctions
Stop junctions
Expansion vessels; Locking heads; Auxiliary pipe-lines
structurally associated with devices for indicating the presence or location of non-electric faults
with devices for relieving electrical stress
Cable inlets
Cable fittings for cryogenic cables
